title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Xpressbees

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Xpressbees
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Xpressbees. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!
